meta.title: Sardunya Girls' Dormitory | Çanakkale
meta.description: The safest and most comfortable girls' dormitory in Çanakkale. Offering students a peaceful living environment with 14 years of experience.

hero.title: Sardunya
hero.subtitle: Girls' Dormitory
hero.sub: Build your future in safe, comfortable and modern living spaces. In the heart of Çanakkale, just 3 minutes walk from campus.

certsSection.label: Documents & Certificates
certsSection.title: Proof of Our Reliability
certsSection.sub: We provide the safest living environment for our students with documents meeting all standards.

facilitiesSection.label: Our Facilities
facilitiesSection.title: Modern & Well-Equipped Facilities
facilitiesSection.sub: We offer modern facilities to support the academic and social development of our students.

facilityItems.title: Dining Hall
facilityItems.desc: Spacious and modern dining room, serving 3 meals a day under dietitian supervision.

facilityItems.title: Kitchen
facilityItems.desc: Fully equipped shared kitchen where students can prepare their own meals.

facilityItems.title: Study Hall
facilityItems.desc: Quiet and modern study environment, equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi.

facilityItems.title: Lounge
facilityItems.desc: Spacious common room with TV, sofas and social activity areas.

aboutSection.label: About Us
aboutSection.title: 14 Years of Trust and Experience
aboutSection.text: Sardunya Girls' Dormitory, founded in Çanakkale in 2010, has provided thousands of students with a safe, comfortable and peaceful living space. With our experienced staff and modern facilities, we have adopted it as our priority to contribute to the academic success and social development of our students.
points: We have hosted more than 200 students since 2010.
We hold all security and hygiene certificates.
Our experienced staff is always by our students' side.
We have a 97% student satisfaction rate.

footer.copy: © 2026 Sardunya Girls' Dormitory. All rights reserved.
